welcome_back:
Assalomu alaykum, {name}! 🌙
Somly AI — your financial assistant, back with you! 💪

Let's control your income and expenses together.
commands:
✍️ Start managing your finances!
Send your expenses via text or voice message:

💸 Example: "Spent 15,000 UZS on fast food, 3,000 on metro, etc."
welcome_msg:
Assalomu alaykum! 🌙
I am Somly AI, your personal financial advisor.

My goal is simple: to guide every Uzbek family towards financial stability.

✅ Completely free
✅ Works with voice and text
✅ Powered by AI
welcome_new: Assalomu alaykum! 🌙 I am Somly AI, your personal financial advisor. My goal is simple: to guide every Uzbek family towards financial stability. Controlling income and expenses is the foundation of prosperity. ✅ Completely free ✅ Works with voice and text ✅ Powered by AI Let's get to know each other! 🤝
ask_phone: Please share your phone number by clicking the button below 📱
add_prompt:
Write your expense, income, or debt, or send a voice message:

💸 '15,000 UZS for a taxi'
💰 'Salary 4 million received'
🤝 'Gave 100 thousand to Jasur'
🎤 You can also say it via microphone
open_miniapp_prompt: Click the button below to open the Mini App:
limit_warning_danger: ⚠️ ATTENTION: Monthly limit reached! Do not make any more expenses.
limit_warning_alert: ⚠️ Warning: You exceeded 80% of your limit! (Spent: {spent})
voice_not_understood: Sorry, I could not understand your voice. Please try again or write it as text.
cat_added_bot:
✅ {name} in Mini App:
New category added:
{emoji} {cat_name} ({cat_type})
debt_paid_bot:
✅ {name} in Mini App:
Debt marked as returned.
choose_lang: Tilni tanlang / Выберите язык / Choose language:
err_ai_busy: ⏳ Currently busy, please try again in 30 seconds.
err_ai_down: 😔 AI is not available right now. Please try later.
err_ai_json:
🤔 I didn't understand. Please be more specific:
'15,000 UZS for taxi'
err_db_connection: ⚠️ Technical issue. Our team has been notified.
err_general: ⚠️ An error occurred. Please try again.
err_voice_download: 🎤 Could not download the voice message. Please type instead.
err_voice_too_short: 🎤 Voice message is too short. Please speak more clearly.
err_voice_whisper: 🎤 Could not understand the voice. Please type instead.
